secondaryServices: Expanded Operations Package (SOPs, dashboards, CRM cleanup, customer comms)
bestFitCustomers: Service businesses losing leads to missed calls
Property managers handling high inbound call volume from tenants, owners, vendors, and applicants
Trades and contractors who can't staff a full-time receptionist
Owners who want a 30-day way to test AI without ripping out their existing stack
badFitCustomers: Businesses that need a full national call center with hundreds of seats
Companies that want a heavyweight FSM platform replacement on day one (try ServiceTitan)
DIY hobbyists looking for a free voice-bot kit
commonProblems: Calls go to voicemail during busy seasons
No visibility into how many leads are leaking
Front-desk turnover or absence stalls the business
Receptionist quality varies day to day
urgentSituations: Receptionist out and the phone is ringing
Storm or seasonal surge produced more calls than the team can handle
Mid-rollout switch from a generic answering service that misqualifies leads
Lost a key inbound rep this week
commonSalesQuestions: How fast can OttoServ go live?
Will it sound like a robot?
What happens to a call OttoServ can't handle?
Does it integrate with my phone system?
How does pricing work after the pilot?
How is OttoServ different from a national answering service?

pricing.summary: 30-Day Pilot is $299 one-time. Monthly plans start at $249 (Starter). Most clients land on Core at $499/mo. Growth at $997/mo. Custom Operations from $2,500/mo.
pricingFactors: Whether the Expanded Operations Package is included

differentiators: Service, not just software — we set it up, tune it, and report on results
$299 30-day pilot lets owners prove value before committing to a monthly plan
Built specifically for service businesses (property managers, contractors, trades, home services)
Clean call summaries that route to the right person on the team
Founder background in low-voltage / AV / fiber / IT infrastructure / SMB operations
guarantees: If the 30-day pilot doesn't produce captured leads, we credit the next plan
Clear scope and pricing written down before any work starts
No multi-year contracts on monthly plans

reviews.author: Founding Partner
reviews.text: We saw the first captured after-hours lead inside week one. The summary email made it obvious which lead to call first the next morning.

caseStudies.title: Contractor stopped losing weekend leads
caseStudies.problem: Weekend and after-hours calls went to voicemail; most prospects didn't call back.
caseStudies.approach: Front Desk AI deployed with a tuned qualification flow, lead summaries routed to the owner by SMS.
caseStudies.result: Captured leads on the first weekend live; reduced morning callback queue from hours to minutes.

competitors.name: ServiceTitan
competitors.positioning: Full FSM platform replacement for larger trades businesses
competitors.whenTheyWin: When the team already has FSM-grade processes and wants the platform-of-record
competitors.whenClientWins: When the team needs lead capture and operational lift this month, not a 6-month implementation

competitors.name: Traditional answering service
competitors.whenTheyWin: When the buyer specifically wants a human voice and complex objection handling on every call
competitors.whenClientWins: When consistency, 24/7 coverage, and clean lead summaries matter more than scripted handoffs

competitors.name: DIY voicebot / Twilio + GPT
competitors.whenTheyWin: When the team has engineering capacity to maintain the integration
competitors.whenClientWins: When the team would rather hire a service that owns the outcome

founderStory: Founded by Jonathan Bradley with a background in low-voltage, AV, fiber, IT infrastructure, SMB operations, automation, real estate, and business process improvement. OttoServ exists because most service businesses are losing 10-30% of their revenue to missed calls, slow follow-up, and broken handoffs.
